caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap with a logo and a black t-shirt featuring the text "CHECK IT LIKE A MAN" sits in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and a gold chain necklace. Positioned in front of him is a professional microphone on a stand. The background consists of a white wall with gold stars and the repeated words "GRIND HUSTLE," alongside a screen displaying "BOSS TALK 101." Two logos appear on the screen: a circular "TALK 101 PODCAST" logo and a red and white "BOSS TALK 101" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He starts by gesturing with his hand open, then brings his hand closer to his body with fingers slightly curled, and finally settles into a more neutral posture while continuing to talk.
